title: potentilla verna subsp. billotii
intro: Potentilla verna subsp. billotii, also known as the Spring Cinquefoil, is a subspecies of the Potentilla verna plant that belongs to the Rosaceae family. It is a perennial herb that has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Potentilla verna subsp. billotii include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate pain. The herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, salves, and other remedies.
